message.content:
@startuml
title create file, add, reset, delete

actor "User" as User

rectangle "GIT" as Git {
  rectangle "Working dir" as WorkingDir
  rectangle "Stage" as Stage
  database "History" as History
}

User --> WorkingDir : create file2
WorkingDir --> Stage : git add file2
Stage --> WorkingDir : git [ reset | reset file2 | reset HEAD file2 ]
WorkingDir --> User : delete file2

note right of WorkingDir : file2 created
note right of Stage : file2 created
note right of WorkingDir : file2 created

note over User, Git : create file2, add, reset, delete
@enduml
